sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 몬스터 베버리지, 2025년 3분기 매출 22억 달러로 16.8% 성장하며 사상 최대 실적 기록

keyPoints.text: 2025년 3분기 매출은 전년 동기 대비 16.8% 증가한 22억 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대 분기 매출을 달성했습니다.
영업이익과 순이익이 각각 40.7%, 41.4% 급증하며 수익성이 크게 개선되었습니다.

businessChanges.text: 핵심인 몬스터 에너지 음료 부문은 외환 효과를 제외하고 16.0%의 매출 성장을 기록했습니다.
전략적 브랜드 부문 매출은 1억 3,050만 달러로 15.9% 성장했으나, 알코올 브랜드 부문은 17.0% 감소한 3,300만 달러를 기록했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 분기 매출은 22억 달러로 전년 동기 18억 8,000만 달러 대비 16.8% 증가했습니다.
희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.53달러로 전년 동기 대비 41.1% 증가했습니다.

watchItems.text: 알코올 브랜드 부문의 매출 감소세가 지속될지, 향후 해당 부문의 전략적 방향성과 회복 가능성을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 tm2530426d1_ex99-1.htm EXHIBIT 99.1 Exhibit 99.1 PondelWilkinson Inc. 2945 Townsgate Road, Suite 200 Westlake Village, CA 91361 Investor Relations T (310) 279 5980 Strategic Public Relations W www.pondel.com CONTACTS: Mark Astrachan SVP, Investor Relations & Corporate Development (951) 739-6200 Roger S. Pondel / Judy Lin NEWS PondelWilkinson Inc. RELEASE (310) 279-5980 MONSTER BEVERAGE REPORTS 2025 THIRD QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS 2025 Third Quarter Highlights · Record Quarterly Net Sales rise 16.8 percent to $2.20 billion · Operating Income increases 40.7 percent to $675.4 million · Net Income increases 41.4 percent to $524.5 million · Net Income Per Diluted Share increases 41.1 percent to $0.53 per share Coro  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.20 billion = 22억 달러; $675.4 million = 6억 7,540만 달러; $524.5 million = 5억 2,450만 달러; $2.20 = 2.20달러; $675.4 = 675.4달러; $524.5 = 524.5달러; $0.53 = 0.53달러; 16.8 percent = 16.8%; 41.4 percent = 41.4%; 40.7 percent = 40.7%; 41.1 percent = 41.1%.

for the 2025 third quarter increased 16.8 percent to $2.20 billion, from $1.88 billion in the same period last year. Net changes in foreign currency exchange rates had a favorable impact on net sales for the 2025 third quarter of $31.8 million. Net sales on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP) 1 increased 15.1 percent in the 2025 third quarter. Net sales, excluding the Alcohol Brands segment, on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP), increased 15.8 percent in the 2025 third quarter. Net sales for the Company’s Monster Energy® Drinks segment, which primarily includes the Company’s Monster Energy® drinks, Reign Total Body Fuel® high perfo  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.20 billion = 22억 달러; $1.88 billion = 18억 8,000만 달러; $31.8 million = 3,180만 달러; $2.03 billion = 20억 3,000만 달러; $1.72 billion = 17억 2,000만 달러; $2.20 = 2.20달러; $1.88 = 1.88달러; $31.8 = 31.8달러; $1.72 = 1.72달러; $2.03 = 2.03달러; 16.8 percent = 16.8%; 15.1 percent = 15.1%; 15.8 percent = 15.8%; 17.7 percent = 17.7%.

ange rates had a favorable impact on net sales for the Monster Energy® Drinks segment of approximately $28.7 million for the 2025 third quarter. Net sales on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP) for the Monster Energy® Drinks segment increased 16.0 percent in the 2025 third quarter. Net sales for the Company’s Strategic Brands segment, which primarily includes the various energy drink brands acquired from The Coca-Cola Company, as well as the Company’s affordable energy brands Predator® and Fury®, increased 15.9 percent to $130.5 million for the 2025 third quarter, from $112.6 million in the 2024 third quarter.
